2026-05-31T09:22:54.3045715Z [36;1m# Create a temporary file[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.3046002Z [36;1mtouch /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.3046251Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.3046495Z [36;1m# Add the opening of the asciiart definition[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.3046879Z [36;1mecho 'static char* asciiart =' > /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.3047205Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.3047424Z [36;1m# Decode base64 ASCII art to a file[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.4251939Z [36;1mecho "" | base64 -d > /tmp/ascii_input.txt[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.5462763Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.5463112Z [36;1m# Process each line of the input ASCII art and format it properly[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.5463520Z [36;1mwhile IFS= read -r line; do[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.5463801Z [36;1m  # Escape backslashes[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.5464102Z [36;1m  escaped_line=$(echo "$line" | sed 's/\\/\\\\/g')[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.5464427Z [36;1m  # Escape any double quotes[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.5464763Z [36;1m  escaped_line=$(echo "$escaped_line" | sed 's/"/\\"/g')[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.5465269Z [36;1m  # Add the line with proper C string formatting[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.5465650Z [36;1m  echo '"'"$escaped_line"'\n"' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.5465990Z [36;1mdone < /tmp/ascii_input.txt[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.5466239Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.5466467Z [36;1m# Add the closing part with VERSION[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.5466924Z [36;1mecho '"             Free60.org XeLL - Xenon Linux Loader " VERSION "\n";' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.5467354Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.5467558Z [36;1m# Add the asciitail part[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.5467891Z [36;1mecho 'static char* asciitail =' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.5468419Z [36;1mecho '"    Special Corona & Winchester Compatible XeLL version\n\n";' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.5468860Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.5469055Z [36;1m# Ensure CP437 encoding[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.5469581Z [36;1miconv -f UTF-8 -t CP437 /tmp/new_asciiart.h > /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h || cp /tmp/new_asciiart.h /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.5470190Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.5470388Z [36;1m# Replace the original file[0m
2026-05-31T09:22:54.5470706Z [36;1mcp /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h source/lv2/asciiart.h[0m
